name: industry-to-company
steps: Verify company summary and eight layers
expected: Within three primary actions the focus entity is NVIDIA and URL state is serializable.

name: three-consecutive-reroots
expected: Breadcrumb contains all steps; time, layers, filters and scoring profile persist; each request respects graph budget.

name: custom-scoring-profile

name: biweekly-calibration
steps: Run calibration on fixture snapshot A
Run again on snapshot B fourteen days later
expected: Current active profile remains unchanged; rejection is logged; both runs are reproducible.
